name: desert
hints: A desert area with a wooden pole in the sand and a pool of liquid.
The pool is safe water here (unlike the acid pool inside the pyramid). You can fill your canteen.
GET WAT with an empty canteen to fill it. GO POO takes you into the water.
GO POO leads to a submerged area (room 24) with a large key. E=pyramid entrance, N=more desert.
notes: Starting area. Pool of water (safe) leads to room 24 with the large key. Fill canteen here. N=desert (2), E=pyramid entrance (4).
